calendar.matters:
ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Close Of Estate
Off Calendar Nov-02-2022 Off Calendar

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: Report, Fees, Final Distribution
Off Calendar Aug-03-2022 Granted Per Written Order

PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY
Off Calendar Oct-13-2021 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

No appearance was made by any Party, Counsel or Interested Person.

This matter was put on for hearing with no appearance required for the purpose of admitting the will. There being no objections, the Court granted the Petition for Probate of Will and for Letters Testamentary. The will dated September 14, 2020 is admitted to probate. Hon Cheong Yong is appointed as the Executor of the estate with full authority. Bond is not required. Order for the same signed in open Court. Status on close of estate is set for November 2, 2022 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204. Shirley Yawitz is appointed probate referee.

Judge: Ross C. Moody. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: S. Park. Not reported.
